records.ety: [L. industrius, industriosus: cf. F. industrieux. See Industry.]

defs: Given to industry; characterized by diligence; constantly, regularly, or habitually occupied; busy; assiduous; not slothful or idle; -- commonly implying devotion to lawful and useful labor.
quotes: Frugal and industrious men are commonly friendly to the established government.

defs: Steadily and perseveringly active in a particular pursuit or aim; as, he was negligent in business, but industrious in pleasure; an industrious mischief maker.
quotes: Industrious to seek out the truth of all things.
